title: Teleport Circles
description: A method of fast travel for use by pack developers and map makers.
body:
![mod title image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c8d2403cf3323696e866c90e95f1566ee93e639.png)
Free teleportation between circles within a dimension. Adds only an entity ```telecir:circle```. Besides renaming, circles can only be interfered with via commands.

place and remove circles with:
```
/summon telecir:circle <x> <y> <z>
/kill <uuid>
```
When first summoned, circles are dormant and nameless. Interact to activate and assign a random name. Interact with an active circle to see a list of other active circles. Select a desination from the list to instantly teleport. Rename a circle by clicking its name above the list in the gui.

This is a utility mod to allow makers of modpacks, adventure maps, etc. to have a simple fast travel method for players in fixed locations. On it's own this mod provides no way for players to access the circles. You'll need to either add them to structures or add an item/block to execute the summon command.

Structures:

[![Henge Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4b6682c4842f6aa2d602c12316783a3054d5b6f.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/teleport-circles-henge-structure)
